methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 20 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Evolv Technology operates in Defense & Security as a public company (NASDAQ: EVLV) that has raised over $400M. The relevant comp universe includes 2 public peers (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private companies, with prominent private benchmarks including Anduril Industries, Saronic, Flock Safety, Shield AI, and Chaos Industries. This narrow peer set reflects the specialized nature of frontier-tech security solutions.

Peer-median valuation analysis is not applicable here. The Defense & Security sector contains 20 same-sector peers overall, but filtering for companies at matching stage, adjacent stage, or comparable valuation tier yielded fewer than three datapoints in any narrow category. Relying on all-sector medians would introduce material distortion given Evolv's distinct business profile and public status versus the predominantly private comp set. Triangulation via comparable companies methodology therefore cannot be reliably executed with the available data.

Without sufficient narrowly-filtered peer multiples, this valuation requires anchoring to alternative approaches—such as discounted cash flow analysis or revenue growth benchmarks within the Defense & Security subsector—to establish a defensible range. The key uncertainty remains the lack of three or more true-comparable peers at the same valuation tier and stage, limiting the precision of market-based valuation support. Market trading data for EVLV itself represents the most reliable pricing signal available.
